title: carlina oligocephala
intro: Carlina oligocephala, also known as the Salsify or Small-flowered Carline Thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits associated with Carlina oligocephala include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. Carlina oligocephala is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal use, and can also be consumed as a food source due to its edible roots.
